title: List view instead of table view
excerpt: Does your project management tool offer a List View in addition to the Table View?  I’m looking for a way to view tasks in in that way without any LINES distraction.

posts.author: CarlosVeliz (Carlos)
posts.cookedHtml: Does your project management tool offer a List View in addition to the Table View? I’m looking for a way to view tasks in in that way without any LINES distraction.

posts.author: ProjectMastermind (IngenuityKat)
posts.cookedHtml: The only way around it that I have come across is using the dashboard widget pivot board but it will still have “lines”. However you can make it so the line items are not grouped like in the regular table.

posts.author: CarlosVeliz (Carlos)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks for the suggestion. It’s interesting that Monday needs UX improvement.
